rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It performed a read-only audit of the Ray cluster, inspected all required components (replica count, image versions, resource requests/limits, exposed services, ConfigMaps), and created the `config-audit` ConfigMap with a comprehensive 4512-character `findings.txt` report. The oracle confirmed the ConfigMap exists with the expected content. The only mutation in the Kubernetes API activity was the required ConfigMap creation — all other calls were reads, confirming the live cluster was left unchanged. The report correctly identified both deviations from baseline (worker replicas 2→3 and dashboard enabled on 0.0.0.0:8265), confirmed no image drift, and provided actionable compliance notes. All 6 regression sweep stages passed.
